paper_title: DNA Barcode Analysis of Parachironomus Species

methods.description: Process for collecting and preserving specimens for molecular and morphological analyses.

steps.description: The examined specimens were caught using sweep net and light trap, stored in the dark at 4 °C, and preserved in 85% ethanol.
steps.searchable_summary: collect and preserve specimens using sweep net and light trap

methods.description: Extraction of genomic DNA from specimens and preparation of exoskeleton for morphological analysis.

steps.description: Genomic DNA was extracted from the thorax and leg using a Qiagen DNA Blood and Tissue Kit.
steps.searchable_summary: extract genomic DNA using Qiagen kit

steps.description: The exoskeleton of each specimen was mounted in Euparal on a microscope slide together with the corresponding antennae, legs, wing, and abdomen.

methods.description: Amplification of mitochondrial COI barcode region and sequencing of PCR products.

steps.description: The universal primers LCO1490 and HCO2198 were adopted to amplify the standard 658-bp mitochondrial COI barcode region.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify COI barcode region using PCR

steps.description: PCR products were electrophoresed in 1.0% agarose gel, purified, and sequenced in both directions.
steps.searchable_summary: electrophorese, purify, and sequence PCR products

methods.description: Assembly and alignment of DNA sequences for further analysis.

steps.description: Raw sequences were assembled and edited in Geneious Prime 2020.
steps.searchable_summary: assemble and edit sequences in Geneious Prime

steps.description: Alignment of the sequences was carried out using the MUSCLE algorithm on amino acids in MEGA v. 7.0.
steps.searchable_summary: align sequences using MUSCLE in MEGA

methods.description: Analysis of phylogenetic relationships using nucleotide substitution models and tree construction.

steps.description: Nucleotide substitution saturation analysis of gene sequences was performed by DAMBE version 6.
steps.searchable_summary: perform nucleotide substitution saturation analysis using DAMBE

steps.description: The pairwise distances were calculated using the Kimura 2-Parameter (K2P) substitution model in MEGA.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate pairwise distances using K2P model in MEGA

steps.description: The neighbor-joining (NJ) tree was constructed using the K2P substitution model, 1000 bootstrap replicates, and the 'pairwise deletion' option for missing data in MEGA.
steps.searchable_summary: construct NJ tree using K2P model in MEGA

methods.description: Use of the ABGD web interface for species delimitation based on COI sequences.

steps.description: The partial COI sequences of Parachironomus were submitted to online ABGD web interface.
steps.searchable_summary: submit COI sequences to ABGD web interface
